section.p: This is a sample FictionBook (FB2) file rendered by the web-file-reader FB2 provider. Each top-level section becomes its own page.
FB2 is an XML format, so the provider parses it and maps elements such as strong, emphasis and paragraphs to safe, sanitized HTML.
section.subtitle: A short verse

section.p: Use the on-screen arrows or the keyboard to page between sections. The viewer keeps a single scrollable surface in both normal and fullscreen modes.

epigraph.p: Simplicity is the soul of efficiency.

section.p: That is the end of this short example.
